---
title: Portfolio Selection
author: Prabhav Shetty
date: 2026-05-22
categories: []
draft: false
---

## Paper Details
Portfolio Selection  
Harry Markowitz  
The Journal of Finance, Vol. 7, No. 1. (Mar., 1952), pp. 77-91.  
[Link](http://links.jstor.org/sici?sici=0022-1082%28195203%297%3A1%3C77%3APS%3E2.0.CO%3B2-1)

##
